title: ellediscs.
description: Adds craftable dyed music discs for use with AudioPlayer.
body:
# ![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbfd6702cc990ec6310e40ec331b8da83ce5119e.png)  

This mod is intended to add blank, customizable music discs for use with [AudioPlayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer). The discs are made up of 3 parts: The record, label, and pattern (optional).


Disc Records can be obtained by either smelting Music Discs. Custom Discs can also be smelted but lose their colour. Disc Labels can be crafted with paper, and Label Patterns cannot be crafted.

![A Music Disc being smelted into a Blank Record](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce1c5cb5afbdada5858b20406527195419dfe913.png)![A Disc Label being crafted with 4 paper in a diamond pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/533730b013a664466b2f2ee8e4b0fb656d7acf67.png)


These parts can be dyed similarly to leather armour.  

![A Blank Record being dyed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ec556974c79981d84d8ae1854e55bd043a172f7.png)
![A Disc Label being dyed with 3 different dyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b3b813cfbff6df753c6cf97db8c358908469cfc.png)


Label patterns can be obtained by washing discs, vanilla or custom-made, in a cauldron, splitting them into their parts. These parts can then be washed again, ready to be dyed. There are 11 unique Label Patterns that can be applied to your discs.

![Pigstep being washed into its separate parts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a3d872a6b51fe628865c5b155357634a75c776e.png)


Finally, they can be combined in a crafting grid, to then be given custom audio via AudioPlayer. There are also extra disc variants that can be crafted by adding an extra item.

![A disc being crafted with a Record, Label, and Pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86073c1d8ccf139cf186b7d766be4899ffcd9de0.png)
![A Cracked Disc being crafted by including Gunpowder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1c520c35d6425d36d13b48812fd8d46d872ea2e.png)

![An Echo Disc being crafted by including a Disc Fragment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8151468111fd3a4aba6ee9649855e24ddd80233c.png)
![A Gradient Disc being crafted by including Glowstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20df7fc962f282a17d4683c785f67c3d85e504f2.png)
